name: claude-code-azure-terraform
postCreateCommand: bash -lc 'claude --version && az version && terraform version && echo "export TF_PLUGIN_CACHE_DIR=\"\$HOME/.terraform.d/plugin-cache\"" >> ~/.bashrc && mkdir -p "$HOME/.terraform.d/plugin-cache"'
postStartCommand: bash -lc 'if [ -n "$ARM_CLIENT_ID" ] && [ -n "$ARM_CLIENT_SECRET" ] && [ -n "$ARM_TENANT_ID" ]; then az login --service-principal -u "$ARM_CLIENT_ID" -p "$ARM_CLIENT_SECRET" --tenant "$ARM_TENANT_ID" && az account set --subscription "$ARM_SUBSCRIPTION_ID" && echo "Azure login successful."; else echo "[SKIP] .env not found or incomplete. Run: cp .env.example .env and fill in credentials."; fi'
